package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	redis "github.com/redis/go-redis/v9"
)

// scenario for redis_ping_per_request: Per-request Redis ping checks instead of startup or explicit health-probe validation.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: data_access; severity: info.
func scenario290Negative(ctx context.Context, client *redis.Client, values map[string]string) error {
	pipe := client.Pipeline()
	for key, value := range values {
		pipe.Set(ctx, key, value, 15)
	}
	_, err := pipe.Exec(ctx)
	return err
}
